---
title: "edstr_extract() : extraction du texte"

vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{edstr_extract() : extraction du texte}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r}
library(edstr)
```

## blabla

préparation

```{r}
#| error: true
edstr_config(
  edstr_dirname = "demo/collect/data",
  edstr_filename = "avc",
  edstr_text = "doc_texte",
  edstr_overwrite = FALSE
)

df_import <- edstr_import()

df_clean <- edstr_clean()
```

## extract

on y va

```{r}
#| error: true
edstr_extract(
  concepts = list(fracture = "fracture"),
  intersect = TRUE,
  group = "ipp"
)
```
